instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: Out of bounds read in networking in Google Chrome prior to 87.0.4280.88 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page.
output: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability in the networking component of Google Chrome versions before 87.0.4280.88 permitted a remote adversary, who had already compromised the renderer process, to access potentially sensitive data from process memory using a specially crafted HTML page.
